name: Wild Mustang Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the meat, onions, and bell peppers together in a large pot until browned.
2. Add all other ingredients to the pot.
3. Bring mixture to a boil for 2-3 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 40 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Increase heat to high and bring to a boil for an additional 2 minutes before serving.
